input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests exercise brittle JDK internals and deprecated SecurityManager paths on JDK 25; the observed javaTest failure appears to require test/expectation adjustment for OGNL 3.3.5 behavior rather than additional setup.
Optional OGNL system properties such as ognl.security.manager and ognl.UseJDK9PlusAccessHandler should only be set inside tests that explicitly exercise those optional modes.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process expression/evaluation library. Its only required runtime dependency for 3.3.5 is org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA, which is already transitive from ognl:ognl:3.3.5; no Docker service, extra test dependency, or required environment/system property is needed for meaningful coverage.
